title: schizachne purpurascens subsp. capillipes
intro: Schizachne purpurascens subsp. capillipes is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the grass family Poaceae. It is a perennial grass native to Asia and is valued for its medicinal properties. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, respiratory problems, and digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Schizachne purpurascens subsp. capillipes include infusions, decoctions, and teas, which can be consumed to harness its health benefits and medicinal properties.
